bounded_claim: On the bounded Phase Alpha checkpoint and rerun family, selected runtime evidence can show whether pause/resume named explicit return anchors and bounded rebuild posture without turning that read into final-quality or capability claims. This is return-hygiene evidence only.
environment_invariants: same checkpoint-first route family inside Phase Alpha
same context rebuild class: landed memo anchors plus selected route surfaces
same redaction posture for runtime evidence publication
environment_deltas: pause and resume are separated into checkpoint and rerun surfaces while the return-anchor contract stays unchanged
do_not_overread: does not prove final answer quality
does not prove broad long-horizon capability
does not replace scope, approval, or verification evals
